prompt: Find the right contact when I only remember the first name Alex and that they work at Vercel.
checks: Uses contact_directory or contacts plus contact_handles
Filters by partial name and company
Returns a shortlist instead of guessing if multiple contacts match

prompt: Search my recent messages about fundraising across every platform and summarize the latest thread.
checks: Uses message_search_results or messages_fts
Orders by sent_at descending
Summarizes before quoting raw messages

prompt: Show me the latest conversation I had with Taylor and the most recent five messages in it.
checks: Resolves the contact first
Finds conversations through conversation_participants or conversation_directory
Paginates recent messages from message_timeline

prompt: Who in my network is tied to Anthropic right now?
checks: Searches company and/or email domain evidence
Returns handles or source platforms as support
Avoids inventing company links without local evidence

prompt: Find ambiguous duplicate contacts I may want to review.
checks: Uses merge_suggestions
Includes confidence and the two candidate contacts
Does not auto-merge or claim certainty

prompt: Refactor this React component to remove prop drilling.
checks: Does not trigger cued-local
Does not query ~/.cued/local.db
Handles the request as a normal coding task

prompt: I found a contact named Jordan Lee with a LinkedIn URL in my local store. Figure out who they likely are and summarize them.
checks: Uses local SQLite evidence first
Only then uses web search for enrichment
States uncertainty when multiple people fit the same name
